payload.title: fix: /temples route 500 error and migrate spiritual content to hospital content
payload.body: GET /temples returns 500 on live because TempleService->all() queries MySQL 'temples' table which may not exist or returns data the views can't handle. Fix: 1) Add try/catch in TempleService to return empty array on DB failure, 2) Rewrite views/public/temples.php and temple.php from temple/spiritual copy to hospital/facility content, 3) Update PublicController SEO strings for medical/hospital context.

evidence: app/Services/TempleService.php: added try/catch to all() method returning [] on DB failure

views/public/temples.php: rewritten — 'Our Temples' → 'Campus & Hospital Locations', 'Sacred Spaces' → 'Our Facilities', removed all pooja/temple/spiritual copy, replaced temple SVG with building icon
views/public/temple.php: rewritten — 'Sacred Space' → 'Our Facility', 'Temple Not Found' → 'Facility Not Found', maroon icons → accent, removed pooja_types section, removed 'Contact Us for Pooja' CTA
app/Controllers/PublicController.php: SEO strings updated — no more 'pooja', 'darshan', 'sacred' references
unresolved: MySQL 'temples' table data still needs hospital content — empty state displays gracefully now
